key.name: color-scheme
key.description: Whether viaduct follows the system color scheme (default), forces a light theme, or forces a dark theme. Maps to AdwColorScheme.

key.name: notifications-on-refresh
key.summary: Show notification when new articles arrive
key.description: When enabled, viaduct emits a desktop notification summarizing the number of new articles received during each refresh cycle.

key.name: refresh-interval-minutes
key.description: How often viaduct fetches new articles in the background. Wired in a future phase that adds the xdg-desktop-portal Background daemon.

key.name: retention-days
key.description: Articles older than this are pruned from the database (starred articles are exempt). Wired by the Phase 14 pruning engine.

key.name: font-monospace
key.description: Optional font family name override for monospace article content. Empty string means "follow system default".

key.name: font-serif
key.description: Optional font family name override for serif article content. Empty string means "follow system default".

key.name: article-theme
key.description: Which NetNewsWire-ported theme renders the article reading pane. "auto" pairs Sepia with light mode and Tiqoe Dark with dark mode; the other values pin a specific theme regardless of system color scheme. The selected theme's accent color also propagates across the GTK chrome (sidebar selection, focus rings, switches) so the entire window visually echoes the reading pane.
